_publications._publicationTitle: RENOVO-NF1 accurately predicts NF1 missense variant pathogenicity.
_publications._context: Here, we optimized our random forest-based predictor RENOVO for NF1 variant interpretation. RENOVO was developed using an approach of 'database archaeology'

basicInfo.description: Random forest-based pathogenicity predictor for NF1 missense variants, trained using a 'database archaeology' approach on curated variant databases; optimized from the original RENOVO framework
basicInfo.licenseDetails: ReNOVo is free non-commercial software. Users need to obtain the ANNOVAR licence by themselves. Contact the Authors for commercial use.
basicInfo.systemRequirements: conda environment recommended; ANNOVAR annotation tool required (separate license)
